calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-18-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Citibank (South Dakota) N.A.
No appearance by defendant Kong M. Ng.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on January 23, 2009.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief was filed today, May 18, 2009.
Declaration of Rhonda Hedges in Lieu of Personal Testimony Pursuant to CCP Section 98 was filed today, May 18, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed wihtout prejudice today, May 18, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Citibank (South Dakota) N.A., and against defendant Kong M. Ng as follows:

Principal - $11,575.15.
Costs - $350.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $11,925.15.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-18-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2009 Set For Trial On May-18-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
